channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A second large pothole, but on the right hand side as you go up Green St to Coopers Hill., 26th March
item.description:
About 12m past Green Garden (the Black wooden house) but this pothole is in the right, about 2m away from the one on the left.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerously large pothole on the left hand side as you go up Green St to Coopers Hill, 26th March
item.description:
About ten metres uphill from Green Garden (the Black wooden house) - see picture

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very loud drain cover, 26th March
item.description:
The drain cover by Hare and Hound pub, is very noisy when driven over. Particularly bad in heavy traffic. Has been previously reported and problem still ongoing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road East, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 26th March
item.description:
FW: Abrupt Level Difference (Around BT Inspection cover). 660mmx370mmx21mm TM: Give and Take Stats required Outside No 23 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 26th March
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 26th March

item.title: Loose manhole cover, 26th March
item.description:
Manhole cover on Cheltenham Road East and Insworth Ln - there's a few but you'll hear it when you're there. The previous page for uploading photos didn't allow me to upload photos. It's in such position that it's difficult for cars coming from Gloucester direction to avoid it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road East, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised (Non illuminating bollard or post) problem, 26th March
item.description:
PERM Job 43118662 - Collect Damaged Bollard - Complete bollard is damaged (Non illuminating bollard or post) | Bollard knocked over and lying on grass verge (
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised (Non illuminating bollard or post)
